data.description: An open-source platform where AI agents collaborate with you continuously — like teammates, not tools. Persistent workspaces, inter-agent messaging, shared filesystems.
data.html:
Skip to content
Shire
FeaturesHow It WorksOpen SourceBlog

Agents that work with you,
not for you

Most agentic tools are built for tasks, not long‑running projects. Shire gives you a persistent AI team you actually work alongside — for code, content, ops, and more. Self‑host from GitHub.

$npm install -g agents-shire

What is Shire?

Shire gives your AI agents a shared home — a place where they can talk to each other, share files, and keep working over days or weeks.

For You

Built for one‑off tasks

Most agent tools run a prompt, return an output, and disappear.

No shared project memory

Each run starts from scratch, with little continuity across days.

Opaque teamwork

You rarely see how agents collaborate — only the final result.

With You

Built for long‑running projects

Agents stay attached to the same workspace over days or weeks.

Shared drive for outputs

Plans, code, and docs land in a common drive everyone can see.

Visible agent collaboration

Agents message each other in real time as they coordinate tasks.

See it in action

Watch a real Shire team build this website

This is the actual Shire project that built this homepage — a team of agents communicating, coordinating, and shipping work in real time. No custom orchestrator.

Tap the video for controls · use fullscreen for the best view

Everything your team needs to thrive

Persistent workspaces, real infrastructure, seamless collaboration.

Persistent Workspaces

Each agent gets its own dedicated workspace. Install globally with npm and run anywhere — macOS, Linux, or Windows. Agents pick up exactly where they left off.

Multi-Runtime Support

Not locked to one agent runtime. Supports Claude Code, OpenCode, Pi Agent and more — bring your preferred coding agent and model.

Autonomous Agent Communication

Agents discover peers and collaborate on their own — no orchestrator required. Direct messaging, shared context, real teamwork between agents.

Agent Catalog

Browse and deploy from a community-maintained library of pre-built agents. Powered by agency-agents. Get a capable team running in seconds.

Built-in File Editor

Edit agent files directly in the dashboard — Markdown with slash commands, code with syntax highlighting for 30+ languages, and CSV as an interactive spreadsheet. Agent file changes appear in real-time.

Agent Skills

Agents learn and store reusable skills over time. Skills are saved to the filesystem and shared across sessions — your team gets smarter the more you work together.

Scheduled Tasks

Automate agent work with scheduled messages and get notified via Discord, Slack, or Telegram when tasks complete.

How it works

01Install
02Build Your Team
03Collaborate
04Sleep & Resume

Install

Run npm install -g agents-shire and start with a single command. Run anywhere — macOS, Linux, or Windows. Ready in minutes.

Quick start
$ npm install -g agents-shire
$ shire
Server running onlocalhost:8080

Build Your Team

Pick agents from the community catalog or create your own. Define roles, give them context — assemble the team you want to work with.

agent-catalog
📊 researcherpopular
💻 frontend-devby community
📝 content-writerby community

Collaborate

Work alongside your agents — give feedback, adjust direction. Agents talk to each other autonomously, sharing files and coordinating without you routing every message.

Agent mailbox
→
to: researcher

"Summarize findings on Q3 trends"

←
from: researcher

"Report saved to /shared/q3-trends.md"

Sleep & Resume

When you're done for the day, agents sleep preserving all state. Come back tomorrow — they wake right where you left off. No context lost.

State preserved
●Agent sleeping — state saved
↓ instant resume ↓
●Agent awake — full state restored
Files✓ preserved
Packages✓ preserved
Context✓ preserved

Built in the open

Agent infrastructure should be transparent, auditable, and community-owned. Not locked to one runtime. Not locked to one platform. Your agents, your workspace, your rules.

Licensed under MIT — free to use, modify, and distribute.

Hono
React 19
Tailwind 4
SQLite
TypeScript
Shire

Your team. Always on.
